name: alert-appreg-secret-summary
displayName: Summary — App Registration Secrets Expiring in 30 Days
description: Fires one alert containing a table of all App Registration secrets expiring in exactly 30 days. The email body includes application name, ID, credential details, and days remaining. Only fires once per credential at the 30-day mark.
query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| where CredentialType == 'Secret' and ObjectType == 'AppRegistration' and DaysToExpiry == 30
| project ApplicationDisplayName, ApplicationId, CredentialDisplayName, CredentialKeyId, DaysToExpiry, EndDateUtc, ExpiryBand
| sort by DaysToExpiry asc
